_publications._publicationTitle: Canonical Wnt/β-catenin signaling drives human schwann cell transformation, progression, and tumor maintenance.

_contextSnippet: Expression of CTNNB1 S33Y resulted in increased expression of MYC, CCND1, AXIN2, LEF1, and BIRC5 in both iHSC1λ and iHSC2λ cell lines
details: Resulted in increased levels of total β-catenin protein and activated Wnt target genes MYC, CCND1, AXIN2, LEF1, and BIRC5
